name: G-5 aggregator: --strict + .claude-tdd-pro/lock.json mismatch on quality_standards_directory_hash is rejected (exit 2)
command:
mkdir -p tree/google .claude-tdd-pro && printf 'source:
  id: g
rules:
  - id: g-ts-001
' > tree/google/g.yaml && printf '{"quality_standards_directory_hash":"sha256:00"}
' > .claude-tdd-pro/lock.json && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/rubric/runner.sh" --root "$PWD/tree" --format json --strict 2>err.txt; rc=$?; [ "$rc" -eq 2 ] && grep -q 'quality_standards_directory_hash mismatch' err.txt && echo mismatch_blocked 1>&2
